metadata.label: Persist SQL
metadata.description: This package provides relational database support for the `bal persist` feature, which provides functionality to store and query data from a relational database through a data model instead of writing SQL.

metadata.label: Persist SQL
metadata.description: This package includes Ballerina `persist` Tooling, which provides functionality to store and query data conveniently through a data model instead of SQL query language.

metadata.label: Persist InMemory
metadata.description: This package provides in-memory table support for the `bal persist` feature, which provides functionality to store and query data from in-memory tables conveniently through a data model.

metadata.label: Persist GoogleSheets
metadata.description: This package provides Google sheets support for the `bal persist` feature, which provides functionality to store and query data from a Google sheets conveniently through a data model.

metadata.label: Persist Redis
metadata.description: This package provides Redis database support for the `bal persist` feature, which provides functionality to store and query data from a Redis database through a data model instead of writing Redis commands.
